title: artemisia pedemontana subsp. assoana
intro: Artemisia pedemontana subsp. assoana is a subspecies of the Artemisia pedemontana plant, a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which contain compounds such as artemisinin, a compound also found in Artemisia annua, known for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. This plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and fighting against bacterial and viral infections. Artemisia pedemontana subsp. assoana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used in traditional medicine to address various health issues.
